wiki.summary: Originally posted as a snippet by Malcolm to his TikTok on October 24th, 2023, the long-awaited ‘Earrings’ was released April 5th, 2024, alongside the entirety of his debut album, Sweet Boy, serving as the first track on the mixtape. During the tracking week ending March 14, 2026, the song debuted at #95 on the Hot 100. The song marked his second appearance on the chart, following 2024’s “Chest Pain (I Love)”. On the chart week dated May 2, 2026, the song reached a new peak at #35. Read more on Last.fm.
